user.title: Home Connect AC
user.description: Enter your Home Connect API credentials from your acctl config.json. Leave Client Secret empty for app-auth (PKCE) credentials.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Home Connect AC
reauth_confirm.description: Your tokens have expired. Run 'uv run acctl app-auth' to get fresh tokens, then paste them here.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Home Connect API
